text:
>>>>> "Andriy" == Andriy Gapon <avg@icyb.net.ua> writes:

 Andriy> changes and would like another o be added: USE_GNUSTEP_GUI
 Andriy> can be removed from the port Makefile and SDL/main.m should
 Andriy> be patched to not include/import AppKit/NSApplication.h at
 Andriy> the same time.

 Andriy> Denis, could you create an updated patch to include this ?

I'll do that and will send the PR.
